SEARCH

Module runtimeSE

module runtimeSE
Module declaration of the runtimeSE module that provides a simple runtime environment for Java applications with support for:
  • application.properties file.
  • a simple logging utility.
  • Inversion-of-Control by scanning for class that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors).
  • advanced CommandRunner interface with command splitting and String[] args type conversion.

  • Packages

    Exported To Modules

    runtimeSE
    All Modules
    All Modules
    The runtimeSE package declares public interfaces of the runtime module.
